# Session 7a oracle worklist: frame amplifiers on entity-000000 frames
# (no icons involved, so no extraction pass is needed; run
# reference-render + catalog render + diff directly).
#
# Full-canvas note: HQ staffs and the largest echelons extend past the
# 200-unit canvas; both renderers clip identically at the viewBox so
# the comparison stays valid, and tight-fit rendering handles real use.

# Echelons 11-18 and 21-26, friend land unit
